overview: This black and white image, captured by a camera trap, shows a spotted wild cat, possibly a jaguar or an ocelot. The animal is positioned in a grassy area at night, likely in a forest environment in Belize or a similar tropical region. The photograph is credited to "Dean Goehrin," whose work may be part of wildlife conservation research initiatives.
